html:
2026-0209
2026-03-13FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActOrder Referring the Matter of the Importation of Certain Vegetable Goods to the Canadian International Trade TribunalOrder Referring the Matter of the Importation of Certain Vegetable Goods to the Canadian International Trade Tribunal in order to hold an inquiry to determine whether canned and frozen vegetables being imported into Canada have increased in quantity to a point where they are causing serious injury, or threat of serious injury to domestic producers.N/A
subject: Order Referring the Matter of the Importation of Certain Vegetable Goods to the Canadian International Trade Tribunal
precis: Order Referring the Matter of the Importation of Certain Vegetable Goods to the Canadian International Trade Tribunal in order to hold an inquiry to determine whether canned and frozen vegetables being imported into Canada have increased in quantity to a point where they are causing serious injury, or threat of serious injury to domestic producers.
